what_was_requested: Session Weakness Filter - validate, publish cf_session_weakness_filter, add to strategy, backtest, and run diagnostics
what_was_done: 1. Searched research memory - no prior session filter work found. 2. Validated custom feature cf_session_weakness_filter (hour-of-week rolling PF classifier, output 0 for weak sessions with PF<0.9, 1 for normal). 3. Published cf_session_weakness_filter successfully. 4. Built feature dataset to materialize the column (54,864 rows). 5. Cloned active-signal-v1 to active_signal_v1_session_filter. 6. Added cf_session_weakness_filter==1 gate to both long and short signals. 7. Saved version 2 of the session-filtered strategy. 8. Ran full-history backtest (2021-03 to 2026-03): 498 trades, Net PnL=$1,308.65, PF=1.305, WR=47.8%, Sharpe=1.056, MaxDD=2.44%. 9. Ran diagnostics: weakest zone Sunday 05:00 UTC still has PF=0.68 - the dynamic rolling PF filter did not fully block this zone, likely because the trailing window calculation smooths out the weakness. 10. Recorded result in research memory.
raw_output:
